title.en: However, he was confident of defeating Longyan ...

content.en:
Ye Tian agreed to be so simple because Longyan Dao Ancestor's record was not very strong.

From the point of view of cultivation, Longyan Dao Ancestor should belong to the late stage of the Unified Realm, and his combat power is afraid that he has the top combat power of the Unified Realm.

Of course, this so-called top-notch Unified Realm combat power is based on the combat power standard of the Xuan Xuan to the Ancient Realm.

As for the Dark Sanctuary side, how to divide the specific combat power of the Unified Realm, he still doesn't know much about it.

However, he was confident of defeating Longyan Dao Ancestor.

"Then let's go to the fighting platform!"

Longyan Daozu directly entered the Douzhan Platform, and Ye Tian also entered the Douzhan Platform.

"It's Longyan Dao Ancestor, he and a half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm have entered the battle platform!"

"That Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor is the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor, the genius on the Ten Thousand Things List, but he doesn't know the Longyan Dao Ancestor, right, he dares to fight against the Longyan Dao Ancestor?"

"Hahaha, Longyan Dao Ancestor specializes in cultivating defensive forbidden dao techniques, and he has a defensive holy body, although that holy body is not as good as the ranks of the three thousand holy bodies, it is a very ordinary holy body, but such a holy body is the most suitable for fighting battle platforms. In the case that you can't use the defense domain weapon and other defense secret treasures, having a defensive holy body and a defensive forbidden dao technique has too many advantages! As soon as someone else's physical body collapses, it is equivalent to losing, but his physical body is not easy to collapse!"

"That's right, and the strength of the Longyan Dao Ancestor is very strong, it is a half-step domain ancestor of the Five-fold Return to One Realm, and the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor is lost!"

......

"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, you are very bold, and you challenge me, the Half-Step Domain Ancestor of the Five-Fold Realm Realm, with the cultivation of the Half-Step Domain Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Realms!"

Longyan Daozu said with a smile.

Anyway, Ye Tian had already agreed to fight and came to power, and it was too late to regret it, so it didn't matter if he talked nonsense.

"Five-fold return to one realm? Could it be that there are specific levels in the one realm?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

"Oh, it seems that the realm you are in is really weak, and you don't even know the division of the Returning Realm, no wonder you dare to challenge me, it's just too ignorant!" Longyan Dao Ancestor was surprised, and immediately explained: "The Returning Realm with a large gap in strength at the level can easily kill the weaker Returning Realm in seconds, so the Domain Ancestors of the Dark Sacred Domain have made a specific division of strength into the Returning One Realm, from the Returning One Realm to the Nine Heavens Returning to the One Realm. And the specific division method is combat power, the major forces have a special place to test combat power, and even the Battle Realm Tower also has a special place to test combat power, which is the Ninefold Battle Realm, and 10 points can go to the Ninefold Battle Realm to test the combat power!

"I see!"

Ye Tian said clearly.

"Let's stop talking nonsense with you, let's beat you as soon as possible!"

Longyan Dao Ancestor made a move.

I saw that he instantly opened the Tianyan Holy Body and slammed into Ye Tian with a punch.

This punch is also a forbidden Dao technique - Heaven Breaking Fist!

Rumble!!!

The space shocked, and the terrifying pressure descended, this blow could easily blow up any one of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, even the hundreds of geniuses at the bottom of the Ten Thousand Things List could hardly withstand this blow.

"Sure enough, it has the combat power of the Xuanxuan to the top of the Ancient Realm, and it is even slightly stronger!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

Of course, the combat power he had when he didn't use the power of the Extreme Dao was enough to surpass this Longyan Dao Ancestor, so he didn't panic at all.

"Dark Pole Spear!"

Ye Tian held the Heaven Killing Spear in his hand and confronted Longyan Dao Ancestor.

Boom!!

Ye Tian was towering and did not move, but Longyan Dao Ancestor was shocked and flew out, and cracks appeared on his indestructible fists.

It was only a matter of time before his Heavenly Rock Holy Body was broken.

I have to admit that Ye Tian's attack power is so terrifying that it surpasses his strongest blow.

"Six-fold return to one realm combat power!"

Longyan Dao Ancestor was extremely dignified.

Among the half-step domain ancestors of the All Things Realm, if you can have the combat power of the five-fold one-realm half-step domain ancestor, it is enough to rank among the top three hundred, and if you have the six-fold one-realm combat power, you can be ranked among the top hundred.

The top ten on the list of all things are the combat power of the seven-fold one-realm half-step domain ancestor, and it is only the first entry, and they all rely on the powerful holy body and many weapon secret techniques to be able to step into this level, once these weapons are gone, it is just half more than half of the seven-fold one-realm combat power at the top of the battle realm tower.

There are half-step domain ancestors in the Ten Thousand Realms who can really rely on their own strength to exert the combat power of the Sevenfold Returning One Realm, but it takes a long time to give birth to one, and even the existence of the Eightfold Returning Realm has been born in history.

But even so, Ye Tian had the combat power of the Sixfold One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, which really shocked him.

He knew that he had underestimated Ye Tian, and now he would not only lose points, but also lose face.

"Damn, it shouldn't have come out!"

Longyan Dao Ancestor secretly regretted it.

Now, he could only hope that Ye Tian was relying on the secret technique to exert the six-fold one-realm combat power, which could not last.

In this way, he can also use his Heavenly Rock Holy Body and Defense Forbidden Dao Technique to resist for a period of time, so as to obtain the final victory.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian shot again, completely using Longyan Daozu as a sandbag, and the body of Longyan Daozu continued to crack with one blow.

Boom Boom Boom !!!

The battle between the two attracted the attention of many half-step domain ancestors, and they were very surprised one by one.

"It's terrifying, the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor actually has the top 100 combat power of all things!"

There is a return to the realm of shock.

Fight outside the stage.

The silver-eyed Dao Ancestor breathed a sigh of relief, Ye Tian's strength was so strong, he didn't lose unjustly at all.

If Ye Tian broke out with all his strength at the beginning, he was afraid that he would be defeated with one move.

"I didn't expect that such a monster could be born in a small realm, I wonder if he has any hope of reaching the top ten of the list of all things?"

Silver-eyed Dao Ancestor thought to himself.

From the realm, plus the top ten on the list of all things, there may be hope to attract the attention of the top ten holy gates, of course, if you get the top three, the hope of joining the top ten holy gates is even greater.

It is too difficult to obtain the first three, and the half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm in a small realm, if there is no strong inheritance, it will not be able to do it at all.

Basically, the top three on the list of all things are all people from the Ten Holy Gates.

It is too difficult for people who are not the Holy Gate to make it to the top three of the list of all things.

After another while, Longyan Dao Ancestor's defensive forbidden Dao technique was shattered many times, unable to condense again, and even the Tianyan Holy Body was blown up and completely defeated.

With the defeat of Longyan Dao Ancestor, Ye Tian was recognized by the Battle Realm Tower as having entered the top 100 of the Everything List.

Soon, on the list of all things, Ye Tian's name rose to 98th.
